_note: The per-set sets/<set>/manifest.json model is GONE. The pipeline is now driven by a single source of truth: godot/assets/tiles/v2/pipeline.json (global settings + a flat list of hierarchical items: master + children + animations, with candidates recorded inline). There is no blank per-set manifest to copy. To author a new family, append an items[] entry to pipeline.json.
_see: references/manifest-schema.md (the pipeline.json shape + every field) and references/intake.md (how intake writes the items[] entry).
